title: Best B.Tech Data Analytics College in Noida
content: The School of Computing Science and Engineering introduces this program to provide graduate training in some focused area of Data Analytics and Business Modeling. It is intensive skill-oriented program with enough practical training for building models for data analytics. With analysis and statistical approach, data analytics is one of the fastest growing career opportunities in the country. The course curriculum is designed to give exposure to the variety of applications that can be built using techniques covered under this program. The primary objective of this program is to provide instruction for enrolled students about current and emerging Big Data-related techniques and theories, including statistics, data mining, data storage, and data visualization. For Lateral Entry: Passed Diploma examination with at least 60% marks in any branch of Engineering and Technology. Or Passed B.Voc/3-year D.Voc. Stream in the same or allied sector. 1) B.E./B.Tech Ist year minimum 60% marks or equivalent 2) 60% PCM or above at XII level. 01 The Graduates of Computer Science and Engineering shall be engaged with leading Global Software Services and Product development companies handling projects in cutting edge technologies. 02 The Graduates of Computer Science and Engineering shall serve in technical or managerial roles at Government firms, Corporates and contributing to the society as successful entrepreneurs through start-up. 03 The Graduates of Computer Science and Engineering shall undertake higher education, research or academia at institutions of transnational reputation. 01 The students of Computer Science and Engineering shall have the ability to work with emerging technologies in computing requisite to Industry 4.0. 02 The students of Computer Science and Engineering shall demonstrate Engineering Practice learned through industry internship and research project to solve live problems in various domains. For Lateral Entry: Passed Diploma examination with at least 60% marks in any branch of Engineering and Technology. Or Passed B.Voc/3-year D.Voc. Stream in the same or allied sector. 1) B.E./B.Tech Ist year minimum 60% marks or equivalent 2) 60% PCM or above at XII level.
